injuries.comment: Jun 18: Terry underwent hip surgery and is expected to need 5-6 months to recover, Chris Johnston of The Athletic reports Thursday.
Feb 28: Locmelis will undergo season-ending shoulder surgery next week, Mark Divver of the New England Hockey Journal reports.
May 20: Danforth (kneecap) was nearly healthy at the end of the Sabres' playoff run, Heather Engel of NHL.com reports Wednesday.
May 19: Kulich (ear) said Tuesday that he had his blood clot removed and will be able to play hockey again, per Bill Hoppe of the Olean Times Herald.
May 3: Ostlund (lower body) isn't expected to be available to play in the second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, according to Rachel Lenzi of The Buffalo News on Sunday.
Apr 16: Bahl (lower body) won't play in Calgary's season finale against Los Angeles on Thursday, per Pat Steinberg of Sportsnet 960 The Fan.
Apr 14: Kuznetsov (upper body) will miss the rest of the 2025-26 regular season, according to Pat Steinberg of Sportsnet 960 The Fan on Tuesday.
Mar 27: Honzek (upper body) will not return this season, per Pat Steinberg of Sportsnet 960 The Fan on Friday.
Feb 21: Huberdeau (hip) was put on injured reserve Saturday, per the NHL media site.
Dec 18: Bean (undisclosed) will need to undergo surgery and is expected to be sidelined indefinitely, Pat Steinberg of Sportsnet 960 The Fan reports Thursday.
Mar 31: Grzelcyk (upper body) will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 regular season, according to Ben Pope of the Chicago Sun-Times on Tuesday.
Mar 31: Levshunov (hand) will not play again in 2025-26, according to Ben Pope of the Chicago Sun-Times on Tuesday.

Jan 8: Ellis (back) and his contract have been traded to Chicago from San Jose, along with Jake Furlong and a 2028 fourth-round pick in exchange for Laurent Brossoit, Nolan Allan and a 2028 seventh-round pick Thursday.
Jul 1: Schwartz (upper body) signed a three-year, $9.75 million contract with the Avalanche on Wednesday, David Pagnotta of The Fourth Period reports.
Jul 1: Hyry (lower body) signed a two-year, $1.8 million contract with the Stars on Wednesday.
May 4: Hintz (hamstring) believes he was close to returning to the lineup after dealing with a setback in his recovery, according to Lia Assimakopoulos of The Dallas Morning News on Monday.
May 4: Seguin (knee) expects to be available for the start of training camp in the fall, Lia Assimakopoulos of The Dallas Morning News reports Monday.
Jul 1: Arvidsson (ribs) agreed to terms on a two-year, $10 million contract with Detroit on Wednesday, Elliotte Friedman of Sportsnet reports.
Apr 15: Appleton (upper body) won't play Wednesday versus the Panthers.
Mar 6: Janmark (undisclosed) underwent season-ending surgery on Friday, per Mark Spector of Sportsnet.
Jul 1: Gudas (ankle) signed a six-year, $9 million contract with the Panthers on Wednesday, Elliotte Friedman of Sportsnet reports.
Jun 30: Florida acquired Markstrom (undisclosed) and Angus Crookshank from New Jersey on Tuesday in exchange for Evan Rodrigues, Jesper Boqvist and Ben Steeves, per Pierre LeBrun of TSN.
Apr 15: Forsling (undisclosed) will miss Florida's season finale against Detroit on Wednesday, per Jameson Olive of the Panthers' official site.
Apr 15: Nosek will miss Florida's season finale against Detroit on Wednesday because of a broken leg, Jameson Olive of the Panthers' official site reports.
Mar 31: Gadjovich (upper body) is not expected to suit up again this season, per Jameson Olive of the Panthers' official site on Tuesday.
Mar 23: Balinskis (lower body) has a fracture and is slated to miss 4-6 weeks, Jameson Olive of the Panthers' official site reports Monday.
Mar 17: Marchand landed on injured reserve Tuesday, per the NHL media site.
Mar 6: Fiala (lower leg fracture) won't be available before training camp for the 2026-27 campaign, per John Hoven of SiriusXM NHL Network Radio.
Jul 1: Bogosian (lower body) signed a one-year, $1.25 million contract with the Wild on Wednesday, Michael Russo of The Athletic reports.
Apr 6: Stramel signed a three-year, entry-level contract extension with the Wild on Monday.
Jun 30: Gritsyuk (upper body) signed a three-year, $9.75 million contract with New Jersey on Tuesday.

Jun 30: Rodrigues (finger) was traded to the Devils from the Panthers on Tuesday along with Jesper Boqvist and Ben Steeves, in exchange for Jacob Markstrom and Angus Crookshank, Pierre LeBrun of TSN reports.

Apr 9: Hughes (undisclosed)  will undergo a procedure and will miss the remainder of the season, it was announced Thursday.
Mar 22: Noesen (knee) has been ruled out for the rest of the season, Kristy Flannery of The Hockey News reports Sunday.
Apr 19: Varlamov (knee) has been returned from his conditioning role with AHL Bridgeport, per the AHL transaction log.
Apr 15: Palmieri (knee) told reporters Wednesday that he should be ready to go for the start of training camp, Stefen Rosner of NHL.com reports.
Apr 14: Pulock (undisclosed) will not play in Tuesday's home matchup versus Carolina.
Apr 12: Romanov (shoulder) will miss the final two games of the regular season, according to Stefen Rosner of NHL.com on Sunday.
Mar 12: Engvall (ankle) will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign, per Stefen Rosner of NHL.com.
Mar 23: Rempe (thumb) probably won't be ready to return before the end of the 2025-26 regular season, according to Vince Z. Mercogliano of The Athletic on Monday.
Apr 27: Zub (lower body) remains about a month away from being fully fit, Bruce Garrioch of Postmedia reports Monday.
May 14: Grebenkin (upper body) may not be ready for the start of the 2026-27 campaign, Charlie O'Connor of PHLY Sports reports Thursday.
May 12: Cates will not need to have a procedure for the foot injury he sustained during the 2026 playoffs, per Charlie O'Connor of PHLY Sports on Tuesday.
May 11: Tippett (undisclosed) was contending with several injuries, including a sports hernia, during the 2026 postseason, Kevin Kurz of The Athletic reports Monday.
Feb 27: Hallander (leg) was recalled from his conditioning stint with AHL Wilkes-Barre/Scranton on Friday, Seth Rorabaugh of Tribune-Review Sports reports.

Apr 17: McCann underwent a procedure Thursday for his lower-body injury, per Mike Benton of the Kraken Audio Network.

Jul 1: MacEwen (knee) signed a two-year contract with the Maple Leafs on Wednesday.
Apr 15: Jarnkrok (undisclosed) will miss Toronto's regular-season finale against Ottawa on Wednesday, David Alter of The Hockey News reports.
Apr 11: Joshua (upper body) will not return to the lineup for the rest of the season, according to David Alter of The Hockey News on Saturday.
Mar 19: Matthews underwent successful MCL knee repair surgery Thursday.
Mar 4: Tanev underwent core muscle surgery Wednesday and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.
Jul 8: Hayton (upper body) signed a one-year, $4.775 million contract with Utah on Wednesday.
Apr 14: Kane (upper body) will most likely miss the Canucks' final two games of the 2025-26 season, Farhan Lalji of TSN reports.
Mar 3: Demko was placed on long-term injured reserve Tuesday.
Feb 27: Lekkerimaki underwent successful shoulder surgery Friday.
Oct 28: Forbort (undisclosed) was placed on long-term injured reserve Tuesday.

Apr 22: Sandin underwent right knee surgery Tuesday for a torn ACL.

Apr 30: Salomonsson underwent shoulder surgery Thursday and is expected to be out for 5-6 months, per Mitchell Clinton of the Jets' official site.
Apr 16: Pionk (undisclosed) is slated to miss the Jets' season finale against San Jose on Thursday.
Apr 16: Nyquist (undisclosed) has been ruled out of Thursday's tilt versus San Jose.
Apr 11: Barron (lower body) won't be an option for Winnipeg's final four games of the regular season, according to Ken Wiebe of The Winnipeg Free Press on Saturday.
